untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of pattern-specific chart formation (EEDB double bottom with equidistant ends), bottom-to-bottom price variation calculation and comparison to median 2.00% threshold, and market regime classification beyond standard indicators. Pattern recognition, variation magnitude measurement, and conditional regime-based performance weighting cannot be expressed with available indicators and operators. Volume trend analysis (falling vs rising) is partially supported but regime-conditional logic is not.
translation_notes: EEDB pattern fundamentally requires candlestick pattern recognition not available in indicator-based rules. The 2.00% variation threshold and regime-conditional performance (small variation in bull markets vs large variation in bear markets) would need custom pattern detection logic. Provided basic breakout structure (close > pivot) as placeholder, but this does not capture the full pattern mechanics. Success rates (78% bull, ~40-41% performance) and failure rate (5%) are statistical outcomes rather than actionable conditions. Volume trend preference cannot be conditionally applied per regime with standard operators.
